description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box constructed from three horizontal slats on each long side and two vertical end panels. The wood has a weathered, grayish finish, giving it a rustic and utilitarian appearance. Each corner is reinforced with visible metal bolts, adding structural stability and a slightly industrial touch. The end panels feature large, rounded rectangular cutout handles for easy carrying. The box is open at the top, with no visible lid or cover, and the interior is spacious, suitable for holding various items. Its design suggests it is intended for practical storage and transport in urban or garage environments.
description: A rustic, weathered wooden storage box with metal bolts and large cutout handles on each end. The box is open-topped and sturdy, ideal for practical storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing three horizontal wooden slats and metal bolts at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large cutout handle and vertical end panel construction.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, with three horizontal slats and corner bolts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the cutout handle and end panel.
attribute_handle_design: side cutout handles integrated into end panels
